title: ReactJS Developer
description: We are looking for a passionate ReactJS Developer to join our team. You will be responsible for building high-quality, high-performance web applications.
requirements: Strong knowledge of React and its core principles.
Good understanding of JavaScript and its latest features.
Familiarity with state management libraries like Redux or MobX.
Knowledge of modern front-end technologies, such as HTML5, CSS3, and REST APIs.
Experience with Git and version control.
Ability to write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.
Good understanding of responsive design and cross-browser compatibility issues.
Good communication and collaboration skills to work effectively in a team environment.

title: Product Designer
description: Shape the user experience across our entire product suite. Translate user needs into intuitive designs.
requirements: Expertise in Figma and prototyping tools.

title: Backend Developer
description: Build robust APIs and microservices. Ensure high availability and security for our core platform.
requirements: Knowledge of AWS services (Lambda, EC2, S3).

title: AI Research Scientist
description: Lead cutting-edge research in NLP and Computer Vision. Push the boundaries of AI.
requirements: PhD or Masters in AI/ML or related field.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage our cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines. Ensure high availability and scalability.
requirements: Experience with AWS or Google Cloud.
Experience with CI/CD tools like Jenkins or GitHub Actions.

title: QA Engineer
description: Ensure the quality of our software through manual and automated testing.
